nasb.text: So he left Asaph and his relatives there before the ark of the covenant of the Lord to minister before the ark continually, as every day’s work required;

esv.text: So David left Asaph and his brothers there before the ark of the covenant of the Lord to minister regularly before the ark as each day required,

cnv.text: 於是在那裡，就是耶和華的約櫃前，大衛留下亞薩和他的親族，照著每日的本分，在約櫃前不斷地事奉。

ccb.text: 大卫派亚萨及其亲族天天在约柜前事奉耶和华，尽当尽的职分；
